description: The problem analysis dashboard gives problem managers a high-level view of ongoing problem analysis work.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number` AS `Incident Number`,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Description` AS C2,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Critical' THEN 'P1 - Critical'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'High' THEN 'P2 - High'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Medium' THEN 'P3 - Medium'
         ELSE 'P4 - Low'
      END AS Priority,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` AS C3,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status_Reason` AS C4,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C5,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Service Type` AS C6,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C7,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`ServiceCI` AS C8,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` IS NULL THEN '(no assignee)'
         ELSE `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` + ' - ' + `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee`
      END AS C22,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Organization` AS C12,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Company` AS C13,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date` AS C14,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submitter` AS C15,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Last Resolved Date` AS C16,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Closed Date` AS C17,
      DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
   WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
LIMIT 100000

SELECT DISTINCT
AVG(DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate())) AS AverageAge
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
LIMIT 100000

SELECT DISTINCT
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number` AS `Incident Number`,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Description` AS C2,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Critical' THEN 'P1 - Critical'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'High' THEN 'P2 - High'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Medium' THEN 'P3 - Medium'
         ELSE 'P4 - Low'
      END AS Priority,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` AS C3,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status_Reason` AS C4,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C5,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Service Type` AS C6,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C7,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`ServiceCI` AS C8,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` IS NULL THEN '(no assignee)'
         ELSE `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` + ' - ' + `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee`
      END AS C22,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Organization` AS C12,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Company` AS C13,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date` AS C14,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submitter` AS C15,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Last Resolved Date` AS C16,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Closed Date` AS C17,
      DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
   WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
LIMIT 100000

      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number` AS `Incident Number`,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Description` AS C2,

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C3
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority`,
        CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
    COUNT( `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number`) as Inccount
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
   WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))

GROUP BY 
   `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority`,
    Aging
LIMIT 100000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('5', '7') THEN '1' END)) As MissedCount,
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('5', '7') THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) AS percentMet
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationUserFriendlyID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
having (COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) > 0
LIMIT 100000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 9 THEN '1' END)) As Aproaching,
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 9 THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) AS percentMet
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationUserFriendlyID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
having (COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) > 0
LIMIT 100000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` NOT IN ('5', '7','9','2') OR `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IS NULL) THEN '1' END)) As Ongoing, 
(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` NOT IN ('5', '7','9','2') OR `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IS NULL) THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)))
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationInstanceID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
having (COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) > 0
LIMIT 100000

SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 2 THEN '1' END)) AS StoppedClock,
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 2 THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) AS percentMet
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationUserFriendlyID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
having (COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) > 0
LIMIT 100000

SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('5', '7') THEN 'Already Missed'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 9 THEN 'Close to Target'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 2 THEN 'Stopped Clock'
      ELSE 'Ongoing'
   END AS SLAStatus,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group`,
   COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)) AS COUNT
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationInstanceID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
GROUP BY SLAStatus,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group`
LIMIT 100000

panels.title: Current resolution status by assigned group

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number` AS `Incident Number`,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Description` AS C2,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Impact` AS impact,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Critical' THEN 'P1 - Critical'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'High' THEN 'P2 - High'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Medium' THEN 'P3 - Medium'
         ELSE 'P4 - Low'
      END AS Priority,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` AS C3,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status_Reason` AS C4,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C5,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Service Type` AS C6,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C7,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`ServiceCI` AS C8,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` IS NULL THEN '(no assignee)'
         ELSE `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` + ' - ' + `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee`
      END AS C22,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` AS AssignedGroup,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Organization` AS C12,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Company` AS C13,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date` AS C14,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submitter` AS C15,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Last Resolved Date` AS C16,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Closed Date` AS C17,
       DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
   WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
LIMIT 100000
